title: Snails in the Rain
overview: Tel Aviv, Summer 1989. Boaz, a beautiful and alluring linguistics student, receives anonymous, male written love letters, that undermine his sexual identity and interfere on his peaceful life with his beloved girlfriend.

trailers.title: Snails In The Rain | Official Trailer | Anonymous letters bring back his suppressed feelings for men
